message:
fix(abi): remove attr.is_null() guard from mutex/condvar init, implement getservent_r host delegation

pthread_abi.rs:
- Remove attr.is_null() precondition from pthread_mutex_init and
  pthread_cond_init host delegation paths. Python 3.13 passes non-null
  attrs with CLOCK_MONOTONIC to pthread_cond_init; mixing native condvar
  init with host-initialized mutexes causes pthread_cond_wait failures
  because the native condvar manipulates the mutex futex word directly,
  which is incompatible with glibc's internal mutex layout.
- Both mutex and condvar init now always delegate to host when available
  (unless FORCE_NATIVE_MUTEX is set), ensuring implementation consistency.

unistd_abi.rs:
- Implement getservent_r by delegating to host_getservent_r instead of
  returning a stub ENOENT. Add the host FFI declaration for getservent_r.
- Rename underscore-prefixed parameters to active names reflecting their
  actual use.

unistd_abi_test.rs:
- Add getservent_r to the import list.
- Add getservent_r_surfaces_first_service_entry test validating that the
  reentrant service lookup populates s_name via host delegation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
